summary.goal: Remove unused dead code and redundant logic
decisions: Removed #[allow(dead_code)] from status_icon() and wired graph.rs to call it via node.status_icon() — eliminates the duplicate inline match
Removed children_of() from Graph impl — never called; graph.rs builds its own children HashMap once up front which is a different access pattern
Removed load_config() from GraphStore — never called by any command; Config is only loaded implicitly during init
Removed _target_id parameter from generate_xml() and generate_plain() in context.rs — unused in both bodies; generate_markdown() keeps its target_id (it uses it at lines 148 and 153)
